enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kannil Vegam, the lyrics explore the journey of a man who embraces fear while embarking on a significant mission. The upbeat tempo and energetic vocals create a sense of excitement and determination, reflecting the character's resolve. This song serves as a motivational anthem, encouraging listeners to face challenges head-on. Set against the backdrop of the movie Samar, it resonates with themes of courage and adventure.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kannil Vegam from Samar is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of adventure and thrill. With the dynamic vocals of K.G. Ranjith, Naveen Madhav, and Suchitra, this song is a celebration of life’s exhilarating moments. Yuvan Shankar Raja’s masterful composition adds a unique flavor, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: In one eye, there is speed; in another eye, there is desire. He is like a mountain stream.
He stands with the earth and reaches for the sky. He is like a hunting bird.
Like a cloud that doesn't rain, he is a thorny bush that gives a flower. He shows his strength.
Like a strong wind, he is a fierce bull. His height is unmatched, and he follows his own path.
samar samar samaran samar samar samaran samar samar samaran show the flower, he is samar samar samaran samar samar samaran samar samar samaran show the fire, he is.
In one eye, there is speed; in another eye, there is desire. He is like a mountain stream.
He stands with the earth and reaches for the sky. He is like a hunting bird.
When the sky sleeps, he is the one who doesn't sleep. He speaks with the earth.
When the stone breaks, the earth breaks too. He writes the ages and brings them to life.
In the cool season, he creates a view; in the sunny season, he works hard to create a garland.
Who is he? Who is he? Who is he?
samar samar samaran samar samar samaran samar samar samaran show the flower, he is samar samar samaran samar samar samaran samar samar samaran show the fire, he is.
Sometimes, I talk to the flowers; I bring the wind together with the rain. I will bring beauty to the wind, and if the storm comes, I will not back down.
I will learn the song; the forest will be my teacher. When I say my name, the cuckoo will sing in the gathering.
Who is he? Who is he? Who is he?
